title: OECD Analytical House Price Indicators (real, nominal, price-to-income, price-to-rent)
time_coverage: 1959–2026 Q2, quarterly (series start dates vary by country; e.g. Sweden from 1959)
units: index (2015=100) and ratio units — see MEASURE/UNIT_MEASURE columns per row
license_terms: OECD Terms and Conditions — free reuse with attribution
notes: SDMX dataflow OECD.ECO.MPD:DSD_AN_HOUSE_PRICES@DF_HOUSE_PRICES(1.0), 'Analytical house prices indicators'. Includes MEASURE codes for real house price index (RHP), nominal house price index, price-to-income ratio, and price-to-rent ratio, seasonally adjusted where applicable. Full time range pulled (no startPeriod filter), country-filtered only.
